# Anurag Kumar

> Portfolio of Anurag Kumar — a full-stack & mobile engineer building secure, performant, and delightful digital products with React, Next.js, Node.js, and React Native.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview, about, experience, featured projects and writings.
- [Projects](/projects): Full list of projects across web, AI, dev tools, desktop, and mobile.
- [Writings](/writings): Case studies and engineering articles.

## Projects

- [Real-Time Digital Signage System](/projects/real-time-digital-signage-system): Enterprise-grade offline-first digital signage platform.
- [University Online Exam Software](/projects/university-online-exam-software): Scalable exam platform serving 5,000+ users.
- [VidChat](/projects/vidchat): Real-time video calling app using WebRTC.
- [Magic Notes](/projects/magic-notes): Open-source collaborative note-taking app.
- [@anuragkmr_45/encrypt-decrypt](/projects/encrypt-decrypt): AES-256-GCM encryption utility for Node.js.
- [rate-limiter-utils](/projects/rate-limiter-utils): Type-safe NPM rate-limiting package.

## Articles

- [Building Secure APIs with Rate Limiting and CSRF Protection](/article/building-secure-apis-rate-limiting-csrf)
- [Offline-First Architecture: Lessons from Building a Digital Signage System](/article/offline-first-architecture-digital-signage)
